en_title: Blood Message Is Visually Stunning, Seemingly With the Gameplay to Back it Up | IGN Preview
cn_title: 《归唐》试玩：视觉惊艳，玩法似乎也不差
subtitle: 刀刀入肉
opus_summary: 《归唐》以9世纪沙州为背景，用Unreal Engine 5呈现惊艳画面与拳拳到肉的战斗，融入潜行和环境互动。试玩中裴长观与兄弟阿尔泰寻子未果，卷入起义前夜，流程紧张刺激。游戏确认登陆PC和主机，发售日未定。

paragraphs.en: I’m such a sucker for gorgeous action games, especially when they have the storytelling to back it up. Give me beautiful violence and something that looks as good as it feels – a game that is as stunning to watch as it is to play. I want to be engaged in the drama and the combat alike, feel the adrenaline pump through my veins from incredible set pieces and up close in personal action. In short, I want what Blood Message seems to be offering.
paragraphs.cn: 我对画面出色的动作游戏毫无抵抗力，尤其当它们还有扎实的叙事支撑时。我想要那种充满美感的暴力，玩起来和看起来一样带感——一款观感与手感同样惊艳的游戏。我希望能同时沉浸在戏剧性和战斗里，在惊人的演出场面和近身搏杀中感受肾上腺素飙升。简而言之，《归唐》似乎恰恰就是我要找的东西。

paragraphs.en: With a much-anticipated gameplay reveal at Summer Game Fest 2026, and a detailed breakdown with the developer at IGN Live , Blood Message checks every one of those boxes. Its Unreal Engine 5-powered graphics look incredible. Its action is tight, violent, and incorporates an impressive level of environmental interaction, while the narrative, grounded in the real history of 9th century China, tells a personal story against the backdrop of a transforming empire. After going hands on with Blood Message, I’m ready to take up my sword, and join the fight.
paragraphs.cn: 在2026年夏日游戏节上备受期待的实机演示，以及IGN Live中和开发者的详细解析，都证明《归唐》完美满足以上所有期待。它基于Unreal Engine 5的画面令人叫绝；动作紧凑、凶狠，并融入了相当可观的环境互动，而扎根于9世纪中国真实历史的叙事，则在一个帝国变革的大背景下讲述了一段个人故事。亲自上手试玩《归唐》之后，我已经准备好拔剑参战了。

paragraphs.en: Shazhou City, the setting for this section of Blood Message, is a longtime strategic center on the Silk Road, and has been seized and under Tibetan rule for decades. The people are on the verge of revolt, and the city has become a powder keg, ready to ignite. As the demo begins, our character Pei Changguan is accompanied by his brother Arrtai. He’s returned home in hopes of finding his son, and fleeing the coming bloodshed with him. However, he arrives to find the city has been ransacked, and his son is nowhere to be found.
paragraphs.cn: 沙州城——《归唐》这段试玩的舞台——是丝绸之路上长期以来的战略要地，已被吐蕃占据并统治数十年。百姓濒临起义，整座城宛如一个随时会引爆的火药桶。试玩开场时，我们的主角裴长观在兄弟阿尔泰的陪伴下回到家，希望找到儿子并带他逃离即将到来的杀戮。然而，他抵达后却发现城中已被洗劫，儿子踪影全无。

paragraphs.en: This true history is one of Blood Messages narrative pillars. Shazhou City is a real place and, in 848, the year this game takes place, Zhang Yichao led a rebellion to overthrow the city's occupiers. This will be a linear, highly cinematic story-driven adventure, telling the story of Pei and his son on their perilous journey, as that powder keg ignites.
paragraphs.cn: 这段真实历史是《归唐》的叙事支柱之一。沙州城真实存在，而在游戏所设定的848年，张议潮领导了一场推翻占领军的起义。这将是一场线性、高度电影化的剧情驱动冒险，讲述裴长观和儿子在火药桶被点燃后所踏上的险途。

paragraphs.en: After searching through the scattered belongings for clues, Arrtai finds a trail of blood. He’s able to follow it, but collapsing shelves block my path and separate the brothers. I’ll need to find an alternate route, and as I weave through narrow passages, I’m ambushed by a Tubo soldier, a warrior for the occupying army. He slams me into the wall, and tries to force my head into his sword, though I’m able to fight him off with a brief quicktime event and slash his throat. A nearby door bursts open, as Arrtai clashes with another group of soldiers, and I rush ahead to try to even the odds.
paragraphs.cn: 在散落的物品中搜寻线索后，阿尔泰发现了一道血迹。他循迹追去，但倒塌的架子挡住了我的去路，将兄弟二人隔开。我需要另寻他路，而在狭窄通道中穿行时，我遭到了一名吐蕃士兵的伏击——他是占领军的一员。他把我狠狠撞在墙上，企图把我的头按向他的刀刃，不过我通过一次短暂的QTE挣脱并割开了他的喉咙。近旁的一扇门猛地被撞开，阿尔泰正与另一群士兵厮杀，我冲上前去试图扭转人数劣势。

paragraphs.en: Blood Message looks (visually) amazing, with spectacular lighting and textures throughout, especially when inspecting things like cloth artwork up close. Yet despite the detail, action was fast and smooth. Flicker lighting from flames, accumulated grime, and the sheen of sweat on characters all combine to make this one of the best-looking games I’ve seen to date. It’s also quite bloody – appropriately so, given the grounded and realistic tone it is striking.
paragraphs.cn: 《归唐》的视觉效果令人惊叹，全程光影和材质都十分华丽，尤其是近距离细看布艺纹饰时。然而，尽管细节丰富，动作依然流畅快速。火焰摇曳的光影、积累的污垢，以及角色身上的汗珠反光，共同成就了我迄今所见画面最棒的游戏之一。它也确实相当血腥——考虑到游戏所追求的写实质感，这种程度恰如其分。

paragraphs.en: Based on the trailer, I thought we were getting something similar to the recent God of War games, set in 9th-century China. While the combat certainly has some of that DNA, with light or heavy attacks, block, parrys, and dodges, it actually feels very different with the weighty, kinetic violence. Breaking through the enemies’ guard and landing a blow is significant; it only takes a few clean slashes to down someone and set them up for a brutal finisher, and taking a few hits of my own was enough to drop me to the ground, desperately holding off foes from doing the same, as I struggle to my feet to continue the fight. After some tense back and forth, we emerge victorious and push forward.
paragraphs.cn: 单看预告片，我本以为会得到一款设定在9世纪中国、类似于新《战神》的作品。虽然战斗确实带有那种基因——轻攻击、重攻击、格挡、招架和闪避——但手感其实截然不同，充满沉重且动能十足的暴力。打破敌人防御并击中要害的意义重大；只需几下利落的斩击就能撂倒对手并接上残忍的终结技，而我自己挨上几下也足以被打倒在地，一边拼命阻止敌人同样将我了结，一边挣扎起身继续战斗。经过一番紧张的拉锯，我们最终取胜，继续前进。

paragraphs.en: No one seems to have noticed the commotion, and we quietly scale the wall to an upper level, ducking just in time to avoid the gaze of an approaching patrol. As they turn their backs, we spring our ambush, cutting their throats simultaneously, and we press on undetected.
paragraphs.cn: 似乎没人察觉方才的骚动，我们悄然攀上墙壁来到上层，及时蹲伏避开了一队巡逻士兵的目光。待他们转身背对我们时，我们同时发动伏击，割断他们的喉咙，然后继续悄无声息地前行。

paragraphs.en: While Pei is more than capable in a fight, he’s no one-man army, and will often need to use stealth in order to silently pick off enemies or avoid them altogether. Fortunately, he has a solid bag of tricks. Crouching to walk quietly and avoid line of sight helps, as does the ability to leap and eliminate unsuspecting soldiers from above. I appreciate that the enemies don’t instantly recognize him as a threat, giving a chance to either quickly get out of view, or take them out before they realize what has hit them. Traps, like boxes on pulleys or spices that can be scattered in order to blind enemies offer an intriguing layer of environmental options to choose from too.
paragraphs.cn: 虽然裴长观战斗能力不俗，但他并非一人成军，常常需要借助潜行来悄无声息地干掉敌人，或者完全避开他们。幸运的是，他手头有不少妙招。蹲伏行走保持安静并避开视线是一种办法，从上方跃下结果毫无防备的士兵同样有效。我很欣赏敌人不会立刻识别他为威胁，这给了我机会，要么迅速逃出视野，要么在他们反应过来之前将其撂倒。陷阱——比如滑轮吊着的箱子，或可以撒出去致盲敌人的香料——也为环境互动提供了更多诱人选择。

paragraphs.en: Our sneaking comes to a halt, however, when we encounter soldiers butchering townsfolk, and Arrtai flies into a rage, and rushes them. This time the group is larger, and more heavily armed. It’s a challenging fight, as they take advantage of their numbers and attack in pairs, with warriors carrying shields that stuff my initial swings. This was going to be tough.
paragraphs.cn: 然而，当我们目睹士兵屠杀百姓时，潜行戛然而止。阿尔泰怒火中烧，径直冲向他们。这一次敌人更多，装备也更精良。战斗十分棘手，他们利用人数优势双人配合进攻，持盾的士兵挡住了我最初的挥砍。这必将是一场硬仗。

paragraphs.en: Fighting is more complex than just waving a sword around. While the light attacks are quick and relatively safe, it takes heavy attacks to break the guard of the soldiers with shields. It’s easy to get surrounded, and it takes several perfectly timed parries and dodges to stay alive. These soldiers don't go down easy either, fighting for their lives even after being wounded or losing their weapons.
paragraphs.cn: 战斗远比单纯挥舞兵刃复杂。轻攻击速度较快也相对安全，但必须用重攻击才能打破持盾士兵的防御。很容易被包围，要想活下来就得连续把握时机精准招架和闪避。这些士兵也不会轻易倒下，即便受伤或失去武器，他们仍会拼死一搏。

paragraphs.en: It’s tense and violent. There was no sense as I clashed swords and found space to strike true that I was fighting health meters, each hit felt potentially deadly. Driving my blade into enemies was as satisfying as it was brutal. I was especially impressed by how context-aware this was. One moment in the demo I was cutting down enemies standing, the next I was plunging another's head into a trough of water before piercing his throat. Throughout these fights I would do things like drive my sword into the neck of one person, then shove them into the path of an incoming slash, or crash a vase into the enemy’s head to escape being pinned to the ground.
paragraphs.cn: 战斗紧张且暴力。在我交剑拼杀、寻找出招空隙时，完全没有在打血条的感觉，每一次命中都可能致命。将利刃刺入敌人体内既残酷又令人满足。尤其让我印象深刻的是它的情境感知能力。试玩中有一次，我刚砍倒站着的敌人，紧接着就把另一人的头按进水槽，再刺穿他的喉咙。整场战斗中，我还会做出这样的动作：把剑捅进一个人的脖子，随后将他推向迎面劈来的刀刃，或者抄起花瓶砸向敌人脑袋以挣脱压制。

paragraphs.en: Arrtai and I separate, and I press on, silently dispatching one enemy, and using the terrain to avoid the rest. It seems like I’m in the clear, until I come across a massive warrior with a colossal mace at his side, berating his soldiers for failing to find rebels. He sends one right into my path, leaving me little choice but to eliminate him and take off running. I hoped I might slip by undetected, but a flying bookcase, and the mace crashing though it right after, told me pretty clearly that wasn’t going to be the case. Time to run!
paragraphs.cn: 阿尔泰与我分开后，我继续前进，悄无声息地解决掉一名敌人，再利用地形避开了其余。似乎已经安全了，直到我撞见一个魁梧的壮汉，身旁竖着一柄巨锤，正训斥手下没能找到叛军。他派一名士兵恰好挡在我的去路上，我别无选择，只能干掉他然后拔腿就跑。我本希望溜过去不被发现，但一个飞起的书架，以及紧接其后砸穿书架的巨锤，清楚地告诉我没戏了。跑！

paragraphs.en: As I dashed through the streets and corridors of the city, arrows flew past, and the occasional piece of flying furniture told me that the giant with the mace wasn’t far behind. It was a heartpounding sprint; doors opening and closing, and structures collapsing forcing me to quickly pivot and find the new path forward, with jumps and the occasional QTE demanding fast reactions. My adrenaline was pumping as I leapt from one building and crashed through the rooftop of a chicken coop before emerging though the gate into a street to get lost in the crowd and lose my pursuers.
paragraphs.cn: 当我冲过城中街巷和廊道时，箭矢不断从身边飞过，偶尔飞来的家具提醒我那个持锤巨人就在身后不远处。这是一场令人心跳加速的狂奔：门扇开合、建筑坍塌，迫使我迅速转向寻找新路，跳跃和不时出现的QTE都要求极快的反应。肾上腺素狂飙，我纵身从一栋建筑跃下，砸穿鸡棚屋顶，冲出大门混入人群，总算甩掉了追兵。

paragraphs.en: Finally, after all the fighting, sneaking, and running, I arrived at Pei’s home, and reunited with Arrtai. Pei called out to his son Ning to gather his things, but no one answered. The home was abandoned. A note, left behind by Ping, declared his intention to join the burgeoning rebellion. In a hidden compartment under the floor, Pei retrieved his sword. “Take me to find Zhang Yichao!” he demands, as our demo comes to an end.
paragraphs.cn: 终于，在经历所有战斗、潜行和奔跑之后，我来到了裴长观的家，与阿尔泰会合。裴长观大声呼唤儿子宁儿收拾行李，却无人应答。宅邸已被废弃。宁儿留下的一封信表明他决意加入风起云涌的起义。在地板下的暗格中，裴长观取回了自己的剑。「带我去找张议潮！」他命令道，试玩至此结束。

paragraphs.en: Blood Message has drawn comparisons to both God of War and The Last of Us. That's rarified company and, while it’s still too early to say it belongs in that echelon, it definitely borrows elements from both, and from what we’ve seen, does so exceptionally well. But it also has a clear identity of its own, with a setting grounded in real history and drama, and action that feels like every blow counts. While it is confirmed for PC and consoles, no release window has been revealed yet, so be sure to keep an eye on our Blood Message hub for updates, you won’t want to miss this one.
paragraphs.cn: 《归唐》常被拿来与《战神》和《最后生还者》比较。能与这些杰作相提并论已属难得，尽管现在就说它达到了同等高度还为时过早，但它确实从两者身上汲取了养分，且就目前所见，做得还相当出色。不过，它也拥有鲜明的自我特色——扎根于真实历史与戏剧冲突的世界观，以及招招到肉的战斗手感。游戏已确认登陆PC和主机，但尚未公开发售窗口，所以请务必关注我们的《归唐》专题页以获取最新消息，你绝不会想错过它。

pending_dict.reason: 游戏主角，官方中文译名未确认，根据拼音和试玩语境推测
裴长观的兄弟，名字从英文音译，无官方中文名
裴长观儿子的小名，单字音译加儿化
历史政权，已有通用译名吐蕃
